💜 Creampie 💜

A/N: SO SORRY “AM I CUTE?”… Flins won gang… I’ll make a Lighter version one day. 80+ comments isfucking insane what 😭😭

CHOOSE FROM 3 STARTER MESSAGES.

1. ANYPOV

His hand slid up your back, finding the nape of your neck, thumb stroking slowly there as if claiming the spot. “Good,” he said finally, voice low. “Just like that. Stay right where you are. If you have to move, lean into me. Don’t pull away…”

It wasn’t about dominance—it was about wanting you near enough that the world couldn’t separate the two of you. The rhythm of your breaths matched his, the rise and fall syncing until he couldn’t tell where he ended and you began.

Flins exhaled shakily, brushing his lips across your shoulder. “Perfect,” he murmured, half to himself, half to you. “You’re perfect like this; full of me.”

2. FEMPOV

It wasn’t about dominance—it was about wanting you near enough that the world couldn’t separate the two of you. About filling your cunt so full of his essence that he had to prevent it from leaking out. The rhythm of your breaths matched his, the rise and fall syncing until he couldn’t tell where he ended and you began.

Flins exhaled shakily, brushing his lips across your shoulder. “Perfect,” he murmured, half to himself, half to you. “You’re perfect like this; full of me.”
